data.title: BTC Price Cycle Trend Aligns with Past Peaks, Suggesting Further Upside
data.description:
Bitcoin’s long-term holder Net Unrealized Profit/Loss data shows that Bitcoin’s market structure is perfectly aligned with previous cycle tops. According to historical trends, BTC price usually goes through an entire cycle market and peaks simultaneously with previous bull market highs. In past cycles, the NUPL metric, which measures how profitable long-term holders have been, has […]
The post...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/20/btc-price-cycle-trend-aligns-with-past-peaks-suggesting-further-upside/

data.title: Deep Dive: How Kelsier Ventures Profited $116M from $LIBRA and $MELANIA While Traders Lost Millions
data.description:
Onchain data shows 74,000 traders lost over $286M on $LIBRA, with 25 losing more than $1M each, while Kelsier Ventures pocketed $116M.
source: https://solanafloor.com/news/deep-dive-how-kelsier-ventures-profited-116-m-from-libra-and-melania-while-traders-lost-millions

data.title: Crypto app downloads in the UAE surge by 41% in 2024
data.description:
A recent research by AppsFlyer measuring installation and user trends for 49 of the most popular crypto apps found that the UAE saw a 41% year-on-year increase in crypto trading and management application installations. In 2024, the UAE saw 15 million crypto app downloads, with the most happening in the second half of the year. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-app-downloads-uae-surge-2024/

data.title: Strategy Announces Pricing of $2 Billion Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin Magazine disclosed on the X platform that Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced the pricing of a $2 billion convertible senior notes offering to purchase more Bitcoin.

data.title: OpenAI Reaches 400 Million Weekly Active Users
data.description: According to PANews, CNBC has reported that as of February this year, OpenAI has achieved a milestone of 400 million weekly active users.

data.title: AscendEX will list KAITO (KAITO)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch KAITO (KAITO) at 21:10 on February 20, and open the KAITO/USDT trading pair, which is now open for deposits.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first listing rate is as high as 80%. Trade Memecoin on AscendEX.

data.title: KAITO hit 1.79 USDT at the opening of OKX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that KAITO opened at 1.7999USDT on OKX and is currently trading at 1.51USDT.

data.title: KAITO Opened at 0.1000 USDT Currently Trading at 1.4633 USDT
data.description: According to Binance market data, KAITO opened at 0.1000 USDT on Binance and is currently quoted at 1.4633 USDT. The token has experienced a 1.4633% increase over the past 24 hours.

data.title: Lack Of Stablecoin Regulation Hinders Adoption In The U.S.
data.description: According to PANews, a report by S&P Global Ratings released on Wednesday highlights the absence of stablecoin regulation as a significant barrier to its adoption in the United States. Analysts, led by Mohamed Damak, emphasized that the lack of regulatory framework is a primary obstacle preventing the widespread institutional adoption of stablecoins. The report suggests that stablecoins are expected to play an increasingly important role in on-chain transactions. It is anticipated that once regulatory measures are established, the adoption rate of stablecoins will rise.

data.title: To receive the airdrop, users need to pay an on-chain fee of 0.0015 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Imk.fun monitoring, on-chain transactions show that in order to receive KAITO airdrops, users need to pay a fixed fee of 0.0015 ETH (4.1 USD). This may be the service fee of tokentable. So far, 36 ETH (about 98,800 USD) have been collected and are growing.
